# D2L Brightspace Connector - Full Documentation

# D2L Brightspace Connector 0.1.0 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for D2L Brightspace (D2L Brightspace Connector) enables Mule applications to
access the Brightspace Learning Environment REST API.

## Configurations

---

### Config

Default configuration.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_Oauth_2_0">OAuth 2.0</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID used to reference this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### OAuth 2.0

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>baseUri</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Base URI for the D2L API.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures TLS. If using the HTTPS protocol, you must configure TLS.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Key</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth consumer key, as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Secret</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth consumer secret, as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorization Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>URL of the service providerâs authorization endpoint.</p></td><td><p><code>https://auth.brightspace.com/oauth2/auth</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Access Token Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>URL of the service providerâs access token endpoint.</p></td><td><p><code>https://auth.brightspace.com/core/connect/token</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scopes</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth scopes to request during the OAuth dance. This value defaults to the scopes in the annotation.</p></td><td><p>core:*:* role:detail:read grades:gradevalues:read grades:gradeobjects:read</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Resource Owner Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Resource owner ID to use with the authorization code grant type.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Before</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a flow to execute right before starting the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>After</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a flow to execute right after an access token has been received.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Auth Server Tls Context</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>References a TLS config to use for HTTP requests during the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Auth Server Proxy Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>References the proxy configuration through which the HTTP request is sent during the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Listener Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configuration for the HTTP listener that listens for requests on the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Callback Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorize Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the local HTTP endpoint that triggers the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>External Callback Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>URL that the OAuth provider uses to access the callback endpoint if the endpoint is behind a proxy or accessed through an indirect URL.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Object Store</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the object store that stores data for each resource owner. If not configured, Mule uses the default object store.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Grades Get Course Completions](#GradesGetCourseCompletions)

- [Grades Get Users Final Grades](#GradesGetUsersFinalGrades)
- [Grades Get Users Grades](#GradesGetUsersGrades)

- [User Update User](#UserUpdateUser)

## Operations

## Assignment Groups Get Assignment Groups

`<d2l:assignment-groups-get-assignment-groups>`

Retrieves assignment groups for the provided organizational unit (Brightspace Learning Environment
API).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Offering Create Course Offering

`<d2l:course-offering-create-course-offering>`

Creates a new course offering.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Offering Delete Course Offering

`<d2l:course-offering-delete-course-offering>`

Deletes a course offering.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Offering Get Course Offering

`<d2l:course-offering-get-course-offering>`

Retrieves a course offering.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Template Create Course Template

`<d2l:course-template-create-course-template>`

Creates a new course template.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Template Delete Course Template

`<d2l:course-template-delete-course-template>`

Deletes a course template.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Course Template Get Course Template

`<d2l:course-template-get-course-template>`

Retrieves a course template.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Enrollment Create Enrollment

`<d2l:enrollment-create-enrollment>`

Creates or updates an enrollment for a user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Enrollment Create Enrollments

`<d2l:enrollment-create-enrollments>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR

- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

`<d2l:enrollment-delete-enrollment-by-orgunit>`

Deletes a userâs enrollment in a provided organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Enrollment Get Enrollments By Orgunit

`<d2l:enrollment-get-enrollments-by-orgunit>`

Retrieves the collection of users enrolled in the identified organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>roleId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role identifier.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>isActive</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to filter by active enrollment status.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>bookmark</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Bookmark for pagination.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Enrollment Get Users Enrollments

`<d2l:enrollment-get-users-enrollments>`

Retrieves a list of all enrollments for the provided user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitTypeId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit type identifier.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>roleId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role identifier.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>bookmark</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Bookmark for pagination.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR

- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Event Student Activity

`<d2l:event-student-activity>`

Retrieves student activity for the organizational unit within the specified date-time range
(Brightspace Learning Environment API).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>startDateTime</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Start of the date-time range for the query.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>endDateTime</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>End of the date-time range for the query.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Grades Get A Users Course Completions

`<d2l:grades-get-a-users-course-completions>`

Retrieves all course completion records for a user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>startExpiry</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Start of the expiry date range for filtering.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>endExpiry</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>End of the expiry date range for filtering.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>bookmark</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Bookmark for pagination.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Grades Get Course Completions

`<d2l:grades-get-course-completions>`

Retrieves all course completion records for an organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>startExpiry</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Start of the expiry date range for filtering.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>endExpiry</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>End of the expiry date range for filtering.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>bookmark</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Bookmark for pagination.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Grades Get Grade Object

`<d2l:grades-get-grade-object>`

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>gradeObjectId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Grade object identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Grades Get Users Final Grade

Retrieves the final grade value for a particular user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>gradeType</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Type of grade to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Grades Get Users Final Grades

`<d2l:grades-get-users-final-grades>`

Retrieves each userâs final grade value for a particular organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>sort</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order for the results.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>isGraded</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to filter by graded status.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchText</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Text to search for in the results.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Grades Get Users Grades

`<d2l:grades-get-users-grades>`

Retrieves all grade values for a particular user assigned in an organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>modifiedSince</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter results modified since this date-time.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR

## Orgunit Create Orgunit

`<d2l:orgunit-create-orgunit>`

Creates a new custom organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Orgunit Delete Orgunit Child Relationship

`<d2l:orgunit-delete-orgunit-child-relationship>`

Deletes the relationship between a provided organizational unit and one of its children.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>childOrgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Child organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Orgunit Delete Orgunit Parent Relationship

`<d2l:orgunit-delete-orgunit-parent-relationship>`

Deletes the relationship between a provided organizational unit and one of its parents.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>parentOrgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Parent organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Orgunit Get Orgunit

`<d2l:orgunit-get-orgunit>`

Retrieves the properties for a provided organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR

## Orgunit Get Orgunit Ancestors

`<d2l:orgunit-get-orgunit-ancestors>`

Retrieves a list of ancestor organizational units for a provided organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ouTypeId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit type identifier for filtering.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>bookmark</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Bookmark for pagination.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Orgunit Get Orgunit Children

`<d2l:orgunit-get-orgunit-children>`

Retrieves a list of child organizational units for a provided organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ouTypeId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit type identifier for filtering.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>bookmark</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Bookmark for pagination.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Orgunit Update Orgunit

`<d2l:orgunit-update-orgunit>`

Updates a custom organizational unitâs properties.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Roles Create Role

`<d2l:roles-create-role>`

Creates a new user role.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>deepCopyRoleId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role identifier to deep copy from.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Roles Get Role

`<d2l:roles-get-role>`

Retrieves a user role.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>roleId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Role identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY

- D2L:NOT_FOUND

- D2L:SERVER_ERROR

- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Roles Get Role By Orgunit

`<d2l:roles-get-role-by-orgunit>`

Retrieves user roles for the organizational unit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orgUnitId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organizational unit identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## Roles Get Roles

`<d2l:roles-get-roles>`

Retrieves all user roles.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## User Attributes Delete User Attributes

`<d2l:user-attributes-delete-user-attributes>`

Deletes custom user attribute values for a user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>* Array of Null * Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## User Attributes Update User Attributes

`<d2l:user-attributes-update-user-attributes>`

Updates user attributes for a user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR

- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED

## User Create User

`<d2l:user-create-user>`

Creates a new user entity.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>apiVersion</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>D2L API version to use for the request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation ID for request tracing.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body payload for the operation.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- D2L:BAD_REQUEST
- D2L:CLIENT_ERROR
- D2L:CONNECTIVITY
- D2L:FORBIDDEN
- D2L:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:NOT_FOUND
- D2L:SECURITY
- D2L:SERVER_ERROR
- D2L:TIMEOUT
- D2L:UNAUTHORIZED
